name: logo-brand-close
title: Logo Brand Close
description: A display-scale wordmark cascades letter by letter into a centered lockup, the accent brand period lands last, an optional tagline and wide-tracked mono URL settle beneath, and the finished identity holds dead still to the end of the film.

variables.label: Wordmark
variables.description: Brand name whose letters cascade into the centered lockup.

variables.label: Tagline
variables.description: Optional tagline that settles beneath the wordmark. Empty hides it.

variables.label: URL
variables.description: Optional mono URL line beneath the tagline. Empty hides it.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Contract color used by the brand period at the end of the wordmark.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Films end on the still hold, so the default is none.
